items.name: 😴 Relaxed Head Floater
items.description: EMOTIX is a lively emote collection that brings personality and humor to every chat. Among its playful lineup, the Floating Chilly stands out—a cute, levitating chili pepper with smooth head movements that bob and sway, giving it a quirky, animated charm. Perfect for reactions that are spicy, chill, or just delightfully fun!
